title: SPU Mandi Date Sheet 2025 @ spumandi.ac.in

detail.title: SPU Mandi Date Sheet 2025 @ spumandi.ac.in
detail.short_info: The officials of SPU Mandi have released the SPU Mandi Date Sheet 2025 for B.A/B.Sc/B.Com. Students are advised to check the timetable to prepare for their exams.

content.text: SPU Mandi Date Sheet 2025 is Out! The Sardar Patel University, Mandi has released the B.A/B.Sc/B.Com. Students can access their SPU Mandi Result 2025 using their registration number through the direct link here. For further updates on SPU Mandi, candidates can follow this page.

rows: Simple, Fast & Free! No Sign Up Required!

sections.heading: Important Details SPU Mandi Date Sheet 2025
How to Download the SPU Mandi Date Sheet 2025?

content.text: Candidates follow the steps to download the Sardar Patel University, Mandi Date Sheet 2025, candidates check the details and download it easily.

items: The University home page will open
The examination Schedules page will pop up
Date Sheet for different courses will show up for Regular and Regular / External.

sections.heading: Direct Link to Download SPU Mandi Date Sheet 2025

rows: NNotification Regarding Regarding change in date sheet of Geology GEOL-202TH (10.10.2025) Evening
Notifications regarding Modifications/Changes in the Date Sheets of UG Supplementary Examination
